title: Golarion Map Scenes
description: The PathfinderWiki interactive map of Golarion as ready-to-use Foundry scenes: 297 faithful map renders from the world map down to individual towns, with hexploration grids in correct miles and location pins linked to gazetteer journals and PathfinderWiki articles.
